flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeastern Community College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (34.7% → 24.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southeastern Community College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.5k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeastern Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southeastern Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.7k).
